title: Set init values for wrapped  async control signals

features.name: register initial value via initial block with async latch conversion
features.description: Code should include a register declaration with an initial block assignment, used in a posedge clocked always block, where the register gets converted to an async latch (aldff) during import

features.name: combinational assertion on initialized register
features.description: Code should include a combinational always @(*) assertion that checks a register value, where that register has an initial block assignment and is used in a clocked always block
